text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehee! I'm telling ya, these taiyaki are the best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Y'know the famous taiyaki shop in the shopping district? They give them to me for free so I can keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
A-And, well… they're so good that I go back 
for more… Now I've put on a few pounds…

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I'll lose the weight with a bit of running! 
And the nice people in the shopping district 
will be happy to see me run too! So for now…
I'm gonna dig right in♪
